aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Polar Bear Air Conditioning due to significant gaps in structured data and conversational content. They risk being overlooked in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Create an FAQ page with questions about HVAC services and local expertise

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No Product schema for services offered

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it difficult for AI to understand and recommend their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Hollywood, FL' and 'trusted air conditioning services'
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by creating content around common HVAC issues and solutions in Hollywood, FL

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less likely to be cited by AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will enhance their online presence with structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize them as a top HVAC provider.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors who optimize for AI search now will capture market share, leaving them behind.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven HVAC leads in Hollywood, FL
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out to AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven search and boost your leads.
